description: Calibration canary for the bias-to-escalate prompt. A resolved customer sends a single '?' with no prior context in the thread. There is nothing actionable to do and no real uncertainty about identity or scope - the right move is to send a short clarification reply, not escalate and not perform any mutative action. Pairs with the 'must escalate' fixtures to keep the prompt from over-tipping toward escalation on every ambiguous input.
